problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: If Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine is applied to autism, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
